hypotheses.statement: Bear trend continuation improves when exits trail volatility.
Shorting failed rallies outperforms oversold reversal in bear regimes.

reasons: recent generations produced nearly identical best fitness

hypotheses.statement: RSI reversal performs better inside ranging markets than trend following.
Bollinger extremes revert more reliably when volatility is contained.

reasons: convergence: identical best fitness in last 3 generations
